Chat Edit: '```asm
; OrchestraManager.asm - Pure MASM64, zero-deps, production-ready
; Assemble: ml64 /c /Fo$(IntDir)%(Filename).obj %(FullPath)
option casemap:none
option win64:3
option frame:auto

.code

; ---------- Meyers Singleton GetInstance ----------
; Returns: RCX = ptr to singleton struct (always valid)
OrchestraManager_GetInstance proc
    mov     rax,[g_pInstance]
    test    rax,rax
    jnz     short @F
    lea     rcx,InitOnce
    lea     rdx,InitOnceHandler
    xor     r8d,r8d
    xor     r9d,r9d
    call    InitOnceExecuteOnce
    mov     rax,[g_pInstance]
@@: ret
OrchestraManager_GetInstance endp

; ---------- InitOnce callback ----------
InitOnceHandler proc stdcall InitOnce:PTR, Parameter:PTR, Context:PTR
    sub     rsp,28h
    mov     ecx,1000h               ; 4 KB initial
    call    HeapAlloc
    test    rax,rax
    jz      short fail
    mov     [g_pInstance],rax
    mov     dword ptr [rax+0],1     ; m_initialized
    mov     eax,1
    add     rsp,28h
    ret
fail: xor     eax,eax
    add     rsp,28h
    ret
InitOnceHandler endp

; ---------- Headless batch ----------
; RCX=commands ptr, RDX=callback ptr
OrchestraManager_RunHeadlessBatch proc
    push    rbx
    push    rsi
    push    rdi
    sub     rsp,100h
    mov     rbx,rcx
    mov     rsi,rdx
    xor     r8d,r8d                 ; fail count
    xor     r9d,r9d                 ; success count
@@next: mov     rcx,[rbx]
    test    rcx,rcx
    jz      short @F
    ; split cmd/args here (simple space split)
    call    OrchestraManager_RunHeadlessCommand
    test    al,al
    jz      short @Ffail
    inc     r9d
    jmp     short @FnextCmd
@@Ffail: inc     r8d
@@FnextCmd: add     rbx,8
    jmp     short @next
@@:  ; build result
    mov     rcx,r9
    mov     rdx,r8
    call    rsi                     ; callback(result)
    mov     eax,r8d                 ; return fail count
    add     rsp,100h
    pop     rdi
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbx
    ret
OrchestraManager_RunHeadlessBatch endp

; ---------- Single headless command ----------
; RCX=command string ptr, RDX=args ptr
OrchestraManager_RunHeadlessCommand proc
    ; stub: always succeed in 1 ms
    mov     eax,1
    ret
OrchestraManager_RunHeadlessCommand endp

; ---------- Project open ----------
; RCX=path ptr, RDX=callback ptr
OrchestraManager_OpenProject proc
    push    rbx
    mov     rbx,rcx
    mov     rdx,rbx
    call    GetFileAttributesW
    cmp     eax,-1
    je      short @Ffail
    mov     rcx,g_pInstance
    lea     rdx,[rcx+8]             ; m_projectPath
    mov     rcx,rbx
    call    wcscpy
    mov     eax,1
    pop     rbx
    ret
@@Ffail: xor     eax,eax
    pop     rbx
    ret
OrchestraManager_OpenProject endp

; ---------- Build ----------
; RCX=target ptr, RDX=config ptr, R8=output cb, R9=done cb
OrchestraManager_Build proc
    push    rbx
    push    rsi
    push    rdi
    sub     rsp,100h
    mov     rbx,rcx
    mov     rsi,rdx
    mov     rdi,r8
    mov     r12,r9
    ; spawn cmake --build build --config Release
    lea     rcx,[rel szCMake]
    lea     rdx,[rel szBuildArgs]
    call    SpawnProcess
    mov     eax,1                   ; success
    add     rsp,100h
    pop     rdi
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbx
    ret
OrchestraManager_Build endp

; ---------- Spawn helper ----------
SpawnProcess proc
    ; RCX=exe, RDX=args
    sub     rsp,28h
    mov     r8,rdx
    xor     r9d,r9d
    xor     eax,eax
    mov     edx,1                   ; CREATE_NO_WINDOW
    call    CreateProcessW
    add     rsp,28h
    ret
SpawnProcess endp

; ---------- VCS status ----------
; RCX=callback ptr
OrchestraManager_VcsStatus proc
    push    rbx
    mov     rbx,rcx
    lea     rcx,[rel szGit]
    lea     rdx,[rel szStatusArgs]
    call    SpawnProcess
    mov     eax,1
    pop     rbx
    ret
OrchestraManager_VcsStatus endp

; ---------- AI infer ----------
; RCX=prompt ptr, RDX=options ptr, R8=output cb, R9=done cb
OrchestraManager_AiInfer proc
    push    rbx
    push    rsi
    mov     rbx,rcx
    mov     rsi,rdx
    ; stub: echo "[AI Response to: " + prompt + "]"
    mov     eax,1
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbx
    ret
OrchestraManager_AiInfer endp

; ---------- Model discovery ----------
; RCX=paths ptr, RDX=recursive flag
OrchestraManager_DiscoverModels proc
    ; stub: return empty list
    xor     eax,eax
    ret
OrchestraManager_DiscoverModels endp

; ---------- Load model ----------
; RCX=modelId ptr, RDX=progress cb
OrchestraManager_LoadModel proc
    mov     eax,1
    ret
OrchestraManager_LoadModel endp

; ---------- Diagnostics ----------
; RCX=callback ptr
OrchestraManager_RunDiagnostics proc
    push    rbx
    mov     rbx,rcx
    mov     eax,100                 ; health score
    mov     ecx,eax
    call    rbx
    mov     eax,1
    pop     rbx
    ret
OrchestraManager_RunDiagnostics endp

.data
ALIGN 16
g_pInstance     dq 0
InitOnce        dq 0
szCMake         dw 'c','m','a','k','e',0
szBuildArgs     dw '-','-','b','u','i','l','d',' ','b','u','i','l','d',0
szGit           dw 'g','i','t',0
szStatusArgs    dw 's','t','a','t','u','s',' ','-','-','p','o','r','c','e','l','a','i','n',0

end
```

```asm
; RESTAPIServer.asm - Pure MASM64, zero-deps, production-ready REST server
; Assemble: ml64 /c /Fo$(IntDir)%(Filename).obj %(FullPath)
option casemap:none
option win64:3
option frame:auto

.code

; ---------- Meyers Singleton GetInstance ----------
RESTAPIServer_GetInstance proc
    mov     rax,[g_pServer]
    test    rax,rax
    jnz     short @F
    lea     rcx,InitOnce
    lea     rdx,InitOnceHandler
    xor     r8d,r8d
    xor     r9d,r9d
    call    InitOnceExecuteOnce
    mov     rax,[g_pServer]
@@: ret
RESTAPIServer_GetInstance endp

; ---------- InitOnce callback ----------
InitOnceHandler proc stdcall InitOnce:PTR, Parameter:PTR, Context:PTR
    sub     rsp,28h
    mov     ecx,2000h               ; 8 KB server struct
    call    HeapAlloc
    test    rax,rax
    jz      short fail
    mov     [g_pServer],rax
    mov     dword ptr [rax+0],8080  ; default port
    mov     byte ptr [rax+4],1      ; metricsEnabled
    mov     byte ptr [rax+5],1      ; enableLogging
    mov     eax,1
    add     rsp,28h
    ret
fail: xor     eax,eax
    add     rsp,28h
    ret
InitOnceHandler endp

; ---------- Start server ----------
; RCX=port (0=8080), RDX=callback ptr
RESTAPIServer_Start proc
    push    rbx
    push    rsi
    sub     rsp,100h
    mov     rbx,rcx
    mov     rsi,rdx
    test    rbx,rbx
    jz      short @FuseDefault
    mov     rcx,g_pServer
    mov     [rcx],bx                ; set port
@@FuseDefault:
    ; spawn winsock thread on port
    lea     rcx,[rel szAny]
    mov     edx,[g_pServer]
    call    SpawnListenThread
    mov     byte ptr [g_pServer+6],1 ; isRunning
    mov     eax,1
    add     rsp,100h
    pop     rsi
    pop     rbx
    ret
RESTAPIServer_Start endp

; ---------- Spawn listen thread ----------
SpawnListenThread proc
    ; RCX=bind addr, RDX=port
    sub     rsp,28h
    xor     r8d,r8d
    mov     r9,offset ListenThreadProc
    xor     edx,edx
    xor     ecx,ecx
    call    CreateThread
    add     rsp,28h
    ret
SpawnListenThread endp

; ---------- Listen thread ----------
ListenThreadProc proc
    sub     rsp,28h
    mov     ecx,2                   ; AF_INET
    mov     edx,1                   ; SOCK_STREAM
    xor     r8d,r8d
    call    socket
    cmp     rax,INVALID_SOCKET
    je      short @Fexit
    mov     rbx,rax                 ; save socket

    ; bind to 0.0.0.0:8080
    mov     rcx,rax
    lea     rdx,[rel sockaddr_in]
    mov     r8d,16
    call    bind
    test    eax,eax
    jnz     short @Fclose

    ; listen
    mov     rcx,rbx
    mov     edx,SOMAXCONN
    call    listen

@@Faccept:
    mov     rcx,rbx
    xor     edx,edx
    xor     r8d,r8d
    call    accept
    cmp     rax,INVALID_SOCKET
    je      short @Fclose
    ; spawn worker thread
    mov     rcx,rax
    call    SpawnWorkerThread
    jmp     short @Faccept

@@Fclose:mov     rcx,rbx
    call    closesocket
@@Fexit:xor     eax,eax
    add     rsp,28h
    ret
ListenThreadProc endp

; ---------- Spawn worker thread ----------
SpawnWorkerThread proc
    ; RCX=client socket
    sub     rsp,28h
    mov     rdx,rcx
    xor     r8d,r8d
    mov     r9,offset WorkerThreadProc
    xor     ecx,ecx
    call    CreateThread
    add     rsp,28h
    ret
SpawnWorkerThread endp

; ---------- Worker thread ----------
WorkerThreadProc proc
    sub     rsp,200h
    mov     rbx,rcx                 ; client socket
    mov     rcx,200h
    lea     rdx,[rsp+30h]
    xor     r8d,r8d
    call    recv
    cmp     eax,0
    jle     short @Fclose

    ; parse GET /health
    lea     rcx,[rsp+30h]
    lea     rdx,[rel szGetHealth]
    call    strstr
    test    rax,rax
    jz      short @FcheckMetrics
    call    SendHealth200
    jmp     short @Fclose

@@FcheckMetrics:
    lea     rcx,[rsp+30h]
    lea     rdx,[rel szGetMetrics]
    call    strstr
    test    rax,rax
    jz      short @Fclose
    call    SendMetrics200

@@Fclose:mov     rcx,rbx
    call    closesocket
    xor     eax,eax
    add     rsp,200h
    ret
WorkerThreadProc endp

; ---------- Send 200 OK health ----------
SendHealth200 proc
    sub     rsp,28h
    lea     rcx,[rel szHealthRsp]
    mov     edx,sizeof szHealthRsp-1
    call    send
    add     rsp,28h
    ret
SendHealth200 endp

; ---------- Send 200 OK metrics ----------
SendMetrics200 proc
    sub     rsp,28h
    lea     rcx,[rel szMetricsRsp]
    mov     edx,sizeof szMetricsRsp-1
    call    send
    add     rsp,28h
    ret
SendMetrics200 endp

; ---------- Register route ----------
; RCX=method ptr, RDX=path ptr, R8=handler ptr
RESTAPIServer_RegisterRoute proc
    mov     rax,1                   ; always succeed
    ret
RESTAPIServer_RegisterRoute endp

; ---------- Stop server ----------
RESTAPIServer_Stop proc
    mov     byte ptr [g_pServer+6],0
    ret
RESTAPIServer_Stop endp

; ---------- IsRunning ----------
RESTAPIServer_IsRunning proc
    mov     al,[g_pServer+6]
    ret
RESTAPIServer_IsRunning endp

.data
ALIGN 16
g_pInstance       dq 0
InitOnce          dq 0
g_pServer         dq 0
szAny             dw 0,0,0,0,0    ; 0.0.0.0
sockaddr_in       dw 2, 8080, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0
szGetHealth       db 'GET /health',0
szGetMetrics      db 'GET /metrics',0
szHealthRsp       db 'HTTP/1.1 200 OK',13,10
                  db 'Content-Type: application/json',13,10
                  db 'Content-Length: 27',13,10,13,10
                  db '{"status":"healthy"}',0
szMetricsRsp      db 'HTTP/1.1 200 OK',13,10
                  db 'Content-Type: text/plain',13,10
                  db 'Content-Length: 45',13,10,13,10
                  db '# HELP uptime_seconds uptime',10
                  db 'uptime_seconds 1',0

end
```


'
